description_long: This object is a circular, stone or concrete water fountain with a central vertical column rising from the middle of a wide, shallow basin. The basin has a polygonal, scalloped edge and appears weathered, with visible stains and discoloration typical of outdoor urban fixtures. The central column features a protruding, cylindrical spout or outlet, and a slightly raised cap or rim at the top, possibly for water dispersion. The structure is robust and utilitarian, designed to withstand heavy use and exposure to the elements. The interior of the basin is slightly sloped toward the center, facilitating water collection and drainage. The overall appearance suggests a public amenity commonly found in parks, plazas, or communal urban spaces.
description: A weathered, circular stone or concrete water fountain with a central column and a protruding spout, set within a polygonal basin.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central column with a prominent spout and the polygonal basin edge.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing more of the basin's interior and the side of the central column.
description_view_2: View highlighting the back of the central column and the continuous basin wall.
description_view_3: View showing the opposite side of the spout, with the basin's edge and column cap visible.
attribute_spout_type: short, straight cylindrical pipe protruding horizontally from the central column
attribute_mounting_location: floor-standing, integrated with a wide circular base resting on the ground
